sn26.1:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, the arising, continuation, production, and manifestation of the eye is the arising of suffering, the continuation of disease, the manifestation of aging-and-death.The arising, continuation, production, and manifestation of the ear … of the nose … of the tongue … of the body … of the mindsn.iii.229is the arising of suffering, the continuation of disease, the manifestation of aging-and-death.
sn26.1:1.2: "The cessation, subsiding, and passing away of the eye … the mind is the cessation of suffering, the subsiding of disease, the passing away of aging-and-death."
